ham.subject: Your Bank Account: Recent Transaction Alert
ham.body:
Dear Valued Customer,

We have detected a recent transaction in your account that requires your attention. Please review the details below:

• Date: 15 April 2026
• Amount: $1,250.00
• Merchant: Tech Solutions Ltd.
• Location: New York, NY

If you recognize this transaction, no further action is needed. If you do not recognize this activity, please log in to your online banking portal immediately to review your account and secure your funds.

Thank you for choosing our services. We are committed to providing you with the highest level of security and support.

Best regards,
Customer Support Team

---
This is an automated message. Please do not reply to this email.

spam.subject: Urgent: Tax Refund Verification Required – Action Needed Immediately
spam.body:
Dear Taxpayer,

The Income Tax Department has identified an outstanding refund entitlement for the fiscal year 2024. In order to process this refund, we require confirmation of your personal and banking details.

Failure to provide the requested information within 7 days may result in a delay of your refund and could trigger additional penalties.

Please click the secure link below to verify your identity and submit the necessary documents:

<URL>

Once you complete the verification, your refund of $3,750.00 will be credited directly to your bank account within 3 business days.

We appreciate your prompt attention to this matter.

Sincerely,

The Income Tax Department

---
This message is confidential and intended solely for the addressee. If you have received this email in error, please delete it immediately.
